response.step_by_step_log: 1. Watched the entire video to identify content. 2. Confirmed that the video is entirely conversational, with Hoshimachi Suisei and Mori Calliope discussing past and future projects, including potential songs for a poll, but with no singing occurring. 3. response.global_summary: A video clip featuring Hoshimachi Suisei and Mori Calliope reminiscing about a past performance, discussing their birthdays, taking a photo, and announcing an upcoming members-only stream where a solo performance will be determined by a viewer poll. No vocal music is performed in this video.

scenes.description: Hoshimachi Suisei and Mori Calliope introduce themselves and reflect on a past live performance.
The pair discusses the stage background and their respective birthdays.
The VTubers chat about taking a photo together.
Announcement of a members-only stream and a poll to vote for a solo performance.
Discussion of the voting process and concluding the video segment.
